lines.line: # Introduction and Interview Context

> Halesteen Graham Days begins the interview with Dolores Howard at Bloomfield Congregational Church in Bloomfield, Connecticut, on March 17, 2023. She sets the stage for the discussion, highlighting that Dolores has reviewed the questions in advance.
** introduction, interview, context, Bloomfield Congregational Church, Connecticut **
keywords: ** introduction, interview, context, Bloomfield Congregational Church, Connecticut **

lines.line: # Family Background and Early Life

> Dolores Howard was born in Hartford, Connecticut, in 1938. She shares about her childhood, her family's relocation, and her parents' employment during and after World War II at companies like Pratt & Whitney and Northrop Grumman.
** family background, early life, Hartford, World War II, Pratt & Whitney, Northrop Grumman **
keywords: ** family background, early life, Hartford, World War II, Pratt & Whitney, Northrop Grumman **

metadata.title: Family Background and Early Life
metadata.synopsis: Dolores Howard was born in Hartford, Connecticut, in 1938. She shares about her childhood, her family's relocation, and her parents' employment during and after World War II at companies like Pratt & Whitney and Northrop Grumman.
metadata.keywords: family background, early life, Hartford, World War II, Pratt & Whitney, Northrop Grumman

lines.line: # Memorable Events of Childhood

> Dolores recalls memorable childhood moments, including living in Bellevue Square and learning about her parents' work ethics. She emphasizes the significance of learning to swim thanks to a facility at Arsenal School, recounting a story about her brother.
** childhood, Bellevue Square, Arsenal School, swim lessons, brother **
keywords: ** childhood, Bellevue Square, Arsenal School, swim lessons, brother **

metadata.title: Memorable Events of Childhood
metadata.synopsis: Dolores recalls memorable childhood moments, including living in Bellevue Square and learning about her parents' work ethics. She emphasizes the significance of learning to swim thanks to a facility at Arsenal School, recounting a story about her brother.
metadata.keywords: childhood, Bellevue Square, Arsenal School, swim lessons, brother

lines.line: # Education and Ambitions

> Dolores discusses how her love for books was kindled by her mother, leading to her academic pursuits. Despite limited opportunities at the time, Dolores aspired for higher education, eventually becoming the first in her family to earn a college degree.
** education, ambitions, reading, library, college degree **
keywords: ** education, ambitions, reading, library, college degree **

metadata.title: Education and Ambitions
metadata.synopsis: Dolores discusses how her love for books was kindled by her mother, leading to her academic pursuits. Despite limited opportunities at the time, Dolores aspired for higher education, eventually becoming the first in her family to earn a college degree.
metadata.keywords: education, ambitions, reading, library, college degree

lines.line: # Projects and Early Achievements

> Dolores recounts winning a citywide dental poster contest in eighth grade, which allowed her to experience a notable event at the Harvard Club. She reflects on how her early recognition in art was never encouraged as a career path.
** projects, achievements, dental poster contest, Harvard Club, art **
keywords: ** projects, achievements, dental poster contest, Harvard Club, art **

metadata.title: Projects and Early Achievements
metadata.synopsis: Dolores recounts winning a citywide dental poster contest in eighth grade, which allowed her to experience a notable event at the Harvard Club. She reflects on how her early recognition in art was never encouraged as a career path.
metadata.keywords: projects, achievements, dental poster contest, Harvard Club, art

lines.line: # High School and Career Path

> Dolores discusses her high school experience at Weaver High School. Despite the prevailing career suggestions, she eventually decided to pursue art after being encouraged by social workers at the YWCA.
** high school, Weaver High, career path, YWCA, art **
keywords: ** high school, Weaver High, career path, YWCA, art **

metadata.title: High School and Career Path
metadata.synopsis: Dolores discusses her high school experience at Weaver High School. Despite the prevailing career suggestions, she eventually decided to pursue art after being encouraged by social workers at the YWCA.
metadata.keywords: high school, Weaver High, career path, YWCA, art

lines.line: # College Life at Pratt

> Dolores shares her experience of attending Pratt Institute, including challenges as one of the few African-Americans in her class. She outlines her journey from lacking an art portfolio to becoming a fashion design student.
** college life, Pratt Institute, African-American, fashion design **
keywords: ** college life, Pratt Institute, African-American, fashion design **

metadata.title: College Life at Pratt
metadata.synopsis: Dolores shares her experience of attending Pratt Institute, including challenges as one of the few African-Americans in her class. She outlines her journey from lacking an art portfolio to becoming a fashion design student.
metadata.keywords: college life, Pratt Institute, African-American, fashion design

lines.line: # Experiences of Discrimination
> Dolores reflects on experiences with discrimination during her time at Pratt Institute, including differential treatment from teachers despite the quality of her work.
** discrimination, Pratt Institute, teachers, differential treatment **
keywords: ** discrimination, Pratt Institute, teachers, differential treatment **

metadata.title: Experiences of Discrimination
metadata.synopsis: Dolores reflects on experiences with discrimination during her time at Pratt Institute, including differential treatment from teachers despite the quality of her work.
metadata.keywords: discrimination, Pratt Institute, teachers, differential treatment

lines.line: # Early Career and Personal Life
> Dolores talks about her early career in the Garment Industry, meeting her husband Milton Howard, and the transition from working in New York to moving back to Connecticut.
** early career, Garment Industry, Milton Howard, Connecticut **
keywords: ** early career, Garment Industry, Milton Howard, Connecticut **

metadata.title: Early Career and Personal Life
metadata.synopsis: Dolores talks about her early career in the Garment Industry, meeting her husband Milton Howard, and the transition from working in New York to moving back to Connecticut.
metadata.keywords: early career, Garment Industry, Milton Howard, Connecticut

lines.line: # Moving to Bloomfield and Family Life

> Dolores details her move to Bloomfield, prompted by her husband’s partnership in an architecture firm. She provides insights into her family life, including anecdotal geography relating to Bloomfield.
** Bloomfield, family life, architecture firm, geography **
keywords: ** Bloomfield, family life, architecture firm, geography **

story.title: Dolores Howard Oral History Part 1 03172023.WAV
story.description: The interview provides a detailed account of Dolores Howard's life, focusing on her family, education, and career. Born in Hartford in 1938, Dolores shares insights into her formative years, highlighting her family's work ethic during the war era and her own educational journey, including her experience at Pratt Institute as a black fashion design student at a predominantly white institution. Her reflections on race and integration, particularly from a childhood trip to segregated Georgia, underscore her evolving awareness of racial dynamics. Dolores also recounts her career trajectory, notable fashion projects, and a transformative period in Liberia. Her experiences traveling and working internationally broadened her perspective on global disparities and informed her later life decisions, including moving back to Connecticut to support her husband's architectural career.
